description: Letter from Rachel b. Avraham Zussman, in Jerusalem, to Yaʿaqov Katz, in Venice. In Yiddish. Dated: 16 Heshvan 5327 AM, which is October 1566 CE. Sent via Rachel's son Moshe in Cairo, who evidently never forwarded it to Venice.
description_he: מכתב בYiddish מירושלים ל-Venice. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
